misconfig_patterns: OVMS backend exposed directly alongside FastAPI wrapper — bypasses wrapper input validation
GET /v1/config leaks all loaded model names and version status
No authentication on TF Serving predict API — direct model inference without wrapper
CORS wildcard on all OVMS endpoints
Model architecture disclosed via /v1/models/{name}/metadata (tensor shapes, dtypes)

active_probe.false_positive_check: response must contain OpenVINO Model Server name and version string in JSON body

deployment_tells: GET /v2/ returns JSON with name=OpenVINO Model Server and version string
GET /v1/config returns model names as JSON keys with version status
Port 9000 default (TF Serving gRPC), port 8080 default (HTTP REST)
Co-located with FastAPI embedding wrapper (port 8001) in typical deployments
Version string includes git commit hash (e.g. 2026.0.0.4d3933c5c)
pivot_paths: GET /v1/config → model name list → cross-reference with HuggingFace Hub to identify model provenance
GET /v1/models/{name}/metadata → SignatureDef input tensor shapes → infer model architecture class (BERT-base vs large, etc.)
Version string git hash → match to OVMS GitHub commit → identify exact build date and patch level
Port 9000 OVMS + Port 8001 FastAPI → deployment pattern fingerprint → find similar deployments via Shodan
